rationale:
- **Metrics**: Crash rate and API latency anomalies persist despite overall improvement (critical metrics violating success criteria: crash rate > 2% at spikes, latency > 400 ms). DAU/WAU dropped sharply, and churn rate spiked, indicating instability. 
- **Sentiment**: Mixed/negative sentiment due to technical issues (login crashes, payment failures, app freezes) and UI problems, directly impacting user trust.
- **Risks**: 13 anomalies detected, including payment success rate outliers (>100%), inconsistent retention, and correlated support ticket spikes. High-risk areas violate success criteria and threaten system reliability.
- **Known Issues**: Payment failures, app crashes, and high latency align with reported anomalies and user complaints.

risk_register.Crash rate spikes and latency anomalies: Investigate root causes with engineering and data teams; prioritize fixes to meet success criteria (<2% crash rate, <400 ms latency).

risk_register.Payment success rate inconsistencies (>1: Audit calculations and validate data integrity to resolve logical errors.

risk_register.DAU/WAU decline and churn spikes: Analyze user segment trends to identify churn drivers and address retention gaps.

risk_register.Support ticket spikes: Correlate with crash data and user feedback; prioritize fixes for technical errors (login crashes, payment failures).

action_plan.Engineering: Conduct root cause analysis for crash rate spikes, latency anomalies, and payment failures within 24 hours. Stress-test API and backend systems.

action_plan.Data Team: Validate DAU/WAU data accuracy and investigate payment success rate outliers. Provide insights on retention trends by user segment.

action_plan.Product Team: Address UI/UX issues in dark mode and resolve technical errors (app freezes, crashes) within 48 hours.

action_plan.Marketing: Draft transparent communication to users about ongoing fixes and upcoming improvements. Highlight positive aspects of the feature to mitigate sentiment.

action_plan.Support Team: Prioritize resolution of support tickets related to crashes and payment failures; monitor correlation with crash data.

communication_plan: Internal: Share risk findings and mitigation plans with stakeholders. External: Issue a blog post or announcement acknowledging technical issues, progress on fixes, and transparency about upcoming improvements. Avoid downplaying user concerns.
confidence_improvement: Clarification on root causes of crash rate spikes and latency anomalies, validation of DAU/WAU data accuracy, and resolution of payment success rate inconsistencies. Additional sentiment analysis post-fix implementation.
